home.seoDescription: Discover luxury villas, premium plots, and high ROI investment opportunities with Prime Estates.

hero.subtitle: Trusted real estate guidance for plots, villas, and premium properties.

featuredProperties.title: Featured Properties
featuredProperties.subtitle: Discover our hand-picked selection of premium real estate.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Prime Estates
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We don't just sell properties; we build long-term relationships based on trust, transparency, and results.

features.title: Verified Properties
features.description: Every property undergoes a strict 50-point legal and structural verification process before listing.

features.title: Transparent Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees. We believe in complete transparency throughout the entire transaction process.

features.title: Legal Assistance
features.description: Our in-house legal team ensures all documentation, registrations, and titles are crystal clear.

features.title: Investment Guidance
features.description: Data-driven insights to help you choose properties with the highest potential ROI and market growth.

features.title: End-to-End Support
features.description: From initial property visits to handing over the keys, we manage the entire lifecycle for you.

investmentOpps.title: High ROI Investment Zones
investmentOpps.subtitle: Capitalize on the fastest-growing locations identified by our market experts.

opportunities.title: Emerging Tech Corridors
opportunities.description: High demand areas driven by new tech parks and corporate relocations.

opportunities.title: Upcoming Transit Hubs
opportunities.description: Properties near upcoming metro lines and major highway expansions.

opportunities.title: Luxury Waterfronts
opportunities.description: Stable, high-value investments with premium rental yields.

propertyDetails.whatsappPrefix: Hi, I want to know more about

aboutPage.seoDescription: Meet your trusted real estate advisor with over 15 years of experience in luxury and investment properties.
aboutPage.pageSubtitle: Your trusted partner in navigating the premium real estate market.
aboutPage.bioPara1: With over 15 years of dedicated experience in the premium real estate market, I have built Prime Estates on the foundation of uncompromised integrity, deep market knowledge, and an unwavering commitment to my clients' success.
aboutPage.bioPara2: My approach is fundamentally different from traditional agents. I operate as a strategic investment advisor, focusing on data-driven property acquisitions that offer both exceptional lifestyle value and strong long-term yields. Whether you are looking for a forever home or expanding your investment portfolio, my team and I provide end-to-end, white-glove service.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We provide completely honest assessments of every property, including potential drawbacks, ensuring you always make informed decisions.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Your long-term financial success and peace of mind are always prioritized over a quick commission. We build generational relationships.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We constantly analyze macro and micro economic data to identify emerging trends before they become mainstream knowledge.

contactPage.seoDescription: Get in touch with Prime Estates to schedule a site visit or request a call back.
contactPage.pageSubtitle: We are here to help you find your dream property.
contactPage.contactInfoDesc: Whether you have a question about a property, want to schedule a site visit, or need investment advice, our team is ready to answer all your questions.
contactPage.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
contactPage.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. One of our agents will contact you shortly.
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: I would like to schedule a site visit for...
